## What We Build

Krow is a software company focused on creating innovative tools, intelligent systems, and products built with precision and purpose.

We operate across **intelligent systems**, **developer tooling**, **software infrastructure**, and **open source**.

### Focus Areas

- **Intelligent Systems** — Practical AI tooling, automation, and inference infrastructure.
- **Developer Tools** — CLIs, libraries, and platform components that improve the developer experience.
- **Software Systems** — Distributed systems, APIs, and backend infrastructure.
- **Open Source** — Shared libraries, internal tooling, and community contributions.

## Philosophy

### Dream
Ideas are the beginning of everything. We imagine possibilities, explore unknowns, and look beyond what already exists.

### Think
Great products are born from understanding. We research, analyse, and engineer solutions with clarity and purpose.

### Build
Ideas only matter when they become reality. We build software that is reliable, beautiful, and useful.

## Engineering Culture

- Small, focused pull requests.
- Tests are required, not optional.
- Documentation is part of the product.
- Ownership end-to-end — from design to deployment.
- Performance and reliability are never afterthoughts.
